arts.ttl: “It should be 3-0 twice” – French journalist talks down giddy fan ahead of Aston Villa match
arts.sum: PSG playing Aston Villa in France is a match which is being hugely anticipated not only by supporters of both teams involved but also by neutrals. arts.ttl: Al-Nassr director hints at Jhon Jáder Durán sale – Part of plan when buying from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Jhon Jáder Durán left Aston Villa in the January transfer window, after being linked with multiple clubs from the previous summer onwards. It looked like the player’s agents were trying to find a lucrative home for the Colombian striker. arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will face Aston Villa for a spot in the semifinals. For Emiliano Martínez, who played a key role in Argentina’s victory over France in the 2022 FIFA World Cup final, it will be a return to French soil. arts.ttl: Aston Villa issued 'priority' warning as Champions League threatens to create big problem
arts.sum: Aston Villa take on Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League quarter-finals on Wednesday night, and the Villans have been warned that an extended run in Europe could spell down news down the line

arts.sum: Marco Asensio will face some familiar faces when Aston Villa take on Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League tonight.
